items.title: GTA 6 leaker trolls internet straight from prison after long hospital stay
items.summary: Arion Kurtaj claims to have access to a burner phone in prison, and he's used it to keep the internet updated on his thoughts

items.title: Rockstar Added Two Trees To GTA Online And It Led To A Lot Of Anger And Confusion
items.summary: How much online anger could two tiny trees create?

items.title: GTA 6 sales could hit $5.2 billion in first week — 5 times GTA 5
items.summary: Rockstar Games is tipped to sell more than 50 million copies of Grand Theft Auto 6 at launch, according to new analysis of pre-order sales.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 leaker who was given an indefinite sentence in 2023 because he wouldn't stop hacking is now out of hospital and awaiting retrial
items.summary: Arion Kurtaj, a member of the Lapsus$ hacking group, was behind a 2022 hack of Rockstar that revealed GTA 6 to the world more than a year before it was announced.

items.title: GTA 6 is on track for "the strongest pre-order campaign ever recorded" and up to $5 billion in sales by "the end of launch week," analysts say
items.summary: Still, reports of GTA 6 pre-orders earning Rockstar billions already are "absurd"

items.title: Former Rockstar Dev Explains GTA 6’s Console-First Approach
items.summary: GTA 6 is shaping up to be the hottest console game launch of the year, but PC gamers won't be sharing in that fun. This is par for the course with developer Rockstar Games, as it has typically prioritized console versions of its games before porting them to PC, a strategy that one former employee says will result in…

items.title: Hacker behind GTA 6 leak that cost Rockstar $5 million reportedly awaiting retrial after being released from secure hospital
items.summary: Arion Kurtaj was previously deemed unfit to stand trial in 2023

items.title: GTA 6 Just Got A Jaw-Dropping Sales Prediction
items.summary: Everyone knows that Rockstar's GTA 6 is going to be an enormous hit upon launch in November this year, but just how big are we talking? A new report from research firm Newzoo makes several stratospheric predictions, led by an estimation that it could earn between $3.3 billion - $5.2 billion in global sales after jus…

items.title: "It's not that we don't care about PC" - Former Rockstar developer suggests why GTA 6 is only coming to consoles at launch
items.summary: GTA 6 is looming like that monolith in 2001: A Space Odyssey, casting its fearsome shadow over the games industry and probably also scaring some monkeys. But PC players won't be able to join in the fun when Rockstar Games ' mega-sequel launches on 19th November, and former studio producer John Ricchio - who worked o…

items.title: Modern Warfare 4 lead isn't scared of the GTA 6 black hole: 'It’s a little head-to-head, that’s great'
items.summary: "It’s a lot of pressure to make sure that you’re creative enough to entertain the masses."

items.title: Ex-PlayStation boss says devs need to reach people who don't care about GTA 6, even if Rockstar's long-awaited game is going to hit "with great force and power"
items.summary: "We need to bring out more games for more people, which means actually you have to have more people making games"

items.title: GTA 6 isn't on PC at launch because it's 'always better to start with the constraints', suggests former Rockstar producer
items.summary: "It's not that we don't care about PC."
